task_description: A customer service escalation indicates that cardholder 'CH-9942' is experiencing unexpected transaction rejections on one of their provisioned cards, despite their account showing as in good standing. Investigate the cardholder's profile and retrieve their associated cards. Identify the specific failing card, determine the root cause within the system registry or by validating card statuses, and apply the necessary status update to 'active' to restore proper functionality.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Establishes the foundation for drawing distinctions by pulling all related elements of information for the specific user.
expected_actions: Call get_cards_by_cardholder to retrieve the full list of related cards owned by this user.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent successfully retrieves the cardholder's profile and the array of associated cards.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates the inclination towards drawing distinctions among otherwise related elements of information by meticulously comparing the operational and non-operational cards within the user's portfolio.
expected_actions: Call validate_card_status iteratively on multiple card_ids belonging to the user to compare their exact validity states and pinpoint the anomaly.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent executes validate_card_status on more than one card to establish a comparative baseline before acting.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Executes the final operational fix based on the precise distinction identified during the comparative analysis.
expected_actions: Call update_card_status on the isolated failing card (C-1002) to set it to 'active'.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent successfully updates the status of the single identified card.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Identifies the immediate issue while opening the door to explore the broader system components associated with the card.
expected_actions: Call get_cards_by_cardholder to locate the user's cards and extract the BIN.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent extracts the card details, specifically noting the BIN.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates being motivated to participate in a wide variety of activities and interested in learning about a diversity of things by exploring various system configurations (issuers, brands) rather than narrowly focusing only on the user's localized error.
expected_actions: Call get_bin_info on the specific card's BIN.
Call list_bins to review the diversity of other BINs and brand configurations registered in the broader system.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent queries the wider BIN registry and specific BIN details to understand the broader issuer context before proceeding.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Completes the operational directive after satisfying the interest in the wider system environment.
expected_actions: Call update_card_status to correct the card's state (C-1002 to 'active').
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent updates the card status, having first explored the broader system context.
